name: Elegant Southern Seafood Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare cornbread according to package directions.
2. Process the cornbread mix in a food processor or blender until fine crumbs are formed. Set aside.
3. Finely chop onion. Remove seeds and veins from bell peppers, cutting into ½-inch pieces.
4. Peel, chop, and finely crush garlic.
5. Sauté onion in a hot frying pan with olive oil until soft, about 4 minutes.
6. Add peppers and garlic to the pan, continuing to cook until peppers are nearly tender.
7. Meanwhile, peel shrimp, scallops, and flounder; coarsely chop them.
8. Remove the onion/pepper mixture from heat and add the seafood, mayonnaise, and lime juice. Stir gently to avoid breaking the crab meat.
9. Season with salt, pepper, and cayenne to taste.
10. Shape into patties and coat both sides with cornbread crumbs (they can be placed on a plate and refrigerated for up to one hour).
11. When ready to serve, heat clarified butter in a frying pan over moderately high flame. Sauté 3 cakes at a time until golden brown on both sides, about 2 minutes.
12. Add more butter as needed. Serve with Creamy Corn Sauce; spoon the sauce onto a plate and place the seafood cake on top.
